rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HAL LIMBIRD TRUST CREATED MAY 31, 1992
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trust Beneficiary M. Nightingale'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order On The Basis Of Extrinsic Mistakes; Etc.
rulings.Rulings: Denied. Respondent has not shown that relief from default is equitable given that Respondent¿s failure to respond was not induced by anyone else and given that Respondent was able to deal with his other business and legal affairs during the period of time when his response was due. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, March 7, 2012.
